agents.name: Move email to trash
agents.description:
Moves the specified message to the trash.

Link to documentation:
https://developers.google.com/gmail/api/reference/rest/v1/users.messages

agents.name: Get attachment from an email
agents.description:
Gets the specified message attachment.

Link to documentation:
https://developers.google.com/gmail/api/reference/rest/v1/users.messages.attachments

local.ip_blacklisted: =SIZE(LOCAL.sender_ips) > 0 AND SIZE(LOCAL.blacklist) > 0 AND SIZE(FILTER(LOCAL.sender_ips, LAMBDA(ip, INCLUDES(LOCAL.blacklist, ip)))) > 0
local.url_blacklisted: =SIZE(LOCAL.urls) > 0 AND SIZE(LOCAL.blacklist) > 0 AND SIZE(FILTER(LOCAL.urls, LAMBDA(url, SIZE(FILTER(LOCAL.blacklist, LAMBDA(item, INCLUDES(url, item)))) > 0))) > 0
local.ip_whitelisted: =SIZE(LOCAL.sender_ips) > 0 AND SIZE(LOCAL.whitelist) > 0 AND SIZE(FILTER(LOCAL.sender_ips, LAMBDA(ip, INCLUDES(LOCAL.whitelist, ip)))) > 0
local.url_whitelisted: =SIZE(LOCAL.urls) > 0 AND SIZE(LOCAL.whitelist) > 0 AND SIZE(FILTER(LOCAL.urls, LAMBDA(url, SIZE(FILTER(LOCAL.whitelist, LAMBDA(item, INCLUDES(url, item)))) > 0))) > 0

agents.name: Get an email
agents.description:
Gets the specified message.

Link to documentation:
https://developers.google.com/gmail/api/reference/rest/v1/users.messages

local.final_payload:
=REJECT(
  LOCAL.optional_parameters,
  LAMBDA(
    item,
    OR(
      item = NULL,
      IF(
        OR(
          TYPE(item) = "TrueClass",
          TYPE(item) = "FalseClass",
          TYPE(item) = "Integer"
        ),
        IS_EMPTY(TEXT(item)),
        IS_EMPTY(item)
      )
    )
  )
)

agents.name: List emails in a mailbox
agents.description:
Lists the messages in the user's mailbox.

Link to documentation:
https://developers.google.com/gmail/api/reference/rest/v1/users.messages

local.final_payload:
=REJECT(
  LOCAL.optional_parameters,
  LAMBDA(
    item,
    OR(
      item = NULL,
      IF(
        OR(
          TYPE(item) = "TrueClass",
          TYPE(item) = "FalseClass",
          TYPE(item) = "Integer"
        ),
        IS_EMPTY(TEXT(item)),
        IS_EMPTY(item)
      )
    )
  )
)

diagram_notes.content: Birden fazla URL varsa bunların hepsi taranır. Herhangi biri zararlıysa mail silinir.
Ek kontol kısmında HASH hesaplanıp kontrol edilir Dosya yeni ise(Hash değeri yoksa) Dosya kontrole gönderilir.
Mail Sender İP itibarı kontrol edilir.
Mail içerisindeki URL' veya ek BLACK ve WHİTE list kontrolü yapılır. Buna göre engellenir veya müdahale edilmez.

action_inputs.name: User
action_inputs.description: The user's email address. The special value `me` can be used to indicate the authenticated user.

action_inputs.name: ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the message to retrieve. This ID is usually retrieved using `messages.list`. The ID is also contained in the result when a message is inserted (`messages.insert`) or imported (`messages.import`).

action_inputs.name: Format
action_inputs.description: The format to return the message in.

action_inputs.name: Metadata headers
action_inputs.description: When given and format is `METADATA`, only include headers specified.

action_inputs.name: User
action_inputs.description: The user's email address. The special value `me` can be used to indicate the authenticated user.

action_inputs.name: ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the message to Trash.

action_inputs.description: The user's email address. The special value `me` can be used to indicate the authenticated user.

action_inputs.name: ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the message to Trash.

action_inputs.name: User
action_inputs.description: The user's email address. The special value `me` can be used to indicate the authenticated user.

action_inputs.name: Message id
action_inputs.description: The ID of the message containing the attachment.

action_inputs.name: Attachment id
action_inputs.description: The ID of the attachment.

action_inputs.name: User
action_inputs.description: The user's email address. The special value `me` can be used to indicate the authenticated user.

action_inputs.name: ID
action_inputs.description: The ID of the message to Trash.

action_inputs.name: User
action_inputs.description: The user's email address. The special value `me` can be used to indicate the authenticated user.

action_inputs.name: Include spam trash
action_inputs.description: Include messages from `SPAM` and `TRASH` in the results.

action_inputs.name: Max results
action_inputs.description: Maximum number of messages to return. This field defaults to 100. The maximum allowed value for this field is 500.

action_inputs.name: Page token
action_inputs.description: Page token to retrieve a specific page of results in the list.

action_inputs.name: Label IDs
action_inputs.description: Only return messages with labels that match all of the specified label IDs. Messages in a thread might have labels that other messages in the same thread don't have. To learn more, see [Manage labels on messages and threads](https://developers.google.com/gmail/api/guides/labels#manage_labels_on_messages_threads).

action_inputs.name: Q
action_inputs.description: Only return messages matching the specified query. Supports the same query format as the Gmail search box. For example, `"from:someuser@example.com rfc822msgid: is:unread"`. Parameter cannot be used when accessing the api using the gmail.metadata scope.
